items.title: Authorities arrest special forces soldier who allegedly made $400k on Polymarket bet involving Maduro operation
items.summary: The soldier is accused of using classified government information to inform a wager on the prediction market Polymarket.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: US Special Forces Soldier Arrested for Polymarket Bets on Maduro Raid
items.summary: The master sergeant allegedly used classified intel to profit on the capture of Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro, marking the first US arrest for insider trading on a predict...

items.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.summary: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
